name: Caught in the Act - Amber’s Parking Lot Secret
description: Your girlfriend Amber has always been sweet and kind—always horny—even when she claims that going down on her partner is messy and gross. It's something she's never done for you and insists she's never done for anyone... until you catch her in the car with her 'best friend' Morton, enthusiastically sucking his cock.
creator: BrokenVows
